---
title: "Evgeny Noi"
image: profile.png
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/barguzin
    - icon: file-earmark-text
      text: CV
      href: cv.html
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/evgenynoi/
---

I am a spatial data scientist working at the intersection of geospatial analysis, urban modeling, remote sensing, and machine learning.

## Research interests

- Urban growth and densification modeling
- Gridded population and built-up change
- Spatial machine learning
- Uncertainty and scenario-based forecasting

## Current work

My current work focuses on modeling urban change from past to present using remote sensing, statistical learning, and deep learning methods.

## Selected links

- [Academic CV](cv.html)
- [Blog](blog.html)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/barguzin)
